name: Exhaust Fans
description: Industrial exhaust and ventilation fans for confined spaces, welding bays, underground works, and construction site air extraction.

machines.name: XTRACTOR PV-300 Portable Ventilation Exhaust Fan
machines.shortDescription: Portable 300mm ventilation exhaust fan with flexible ducting. XTRACTOR PV-300 for confined space air extraction, welding fume removal, and manhole ventilation.
machines.description: Portable 300mm ventilation exhaust fan with flexible ducting. XTRACTOR PV-300 for confined space air extraction, welding fume removal, and manhole ventilation. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.

specifications.Features: Carry handle, integrated duct flange, steel housing

features: 2,500 m³/hr extraction clears welding fumes and solvent vapours from confined spaces
5 m flexible PVC ducting routes around obstacles into manholes, tanks, and trenches
18 kg with carry handle — one worker carries the fan and duct to the access point
IP44 rated motor tolerates water spray, dust, and site conditions that kill office fans
230V single-phase plugs into standard site power — no 3-phase or generator needed
Steel housing with integrated duct flange for quick-connect without hose clamps

machines.name: Canarm S12-E1D Standard Duty Wall Exhaust Fan
machines.shortDescription: Canarm S12-E1D 12-inch wall-mounted exhaust fan with shutter. Standard-duty unit for workshop ventilation, spray booth extraction, and warehouse air change.
machines.description: Canarm S12-E1D 12-inch wall-mounted exhaust fan with shutter. Standard-duty unit for workshop ventilation, spray booth extraction, and warehouse air change. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Gravity shutter opens on airflow and closes when off — no motorized damper needed
1,500 CFM extraction rate replaces air in a 100 m² workshop every 5 minutes
Galvanized steel frame and blades — zero corrosion from humid Gulf air
8 kg wall-mount design with pre-drilled flange for 15-minute installation
230V single-phase motor with thermal overload protection against stalled-blade burnout
65 dB(A) noise level permits ventilation during occupied working hours

machines.name: Trotec TTV 4500 High-Performance Axial Fan
machines.shortDescription: High-performance 450mm axial fan with 4,500 m³/hr airflow. Trotec TTV 4500 for large-area ventilation, construction drying, and air circulation in industrial spaces.
machines.description: High-performance 450mm axial fan with 4,500 m³/hr airflow. Trotec TTV 4500 for large-area ventilation, construction drying, and air circulation in industrial spaces. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: 4,500 m³/hr — one fan ventilates an entire basement parking excavation or tunnel section
2-speed motor with 5 m rubber cable — deploy and power without extension leads
Steel tubular frame with dual carry handles for two-person positioning
Axial blade design optimized for high volume at low static — maximum air moved per watt
Trotec German motor engineering with thermal cutout and sealed ball bearings
15 kg weight with stackable design for compact transport between job sites

machines.name: Vents OV 4E 450 Industrial Axial Exhaust Fan
machines.shortDescription: Vents OV 4E 450 industrial axial exhaust fan rated 4,000 m³/hr. Built for duct-mounted extraction in commercial kitchens, factory ventilation, and mechanical service risers.
machines.description: Vents OV 4E 450 industrial axial exhaust fan rated 4,000 m³/hr. Built for duct-mounted extraction in commercial kitchens, factory ventilation, and mechanical service risers. Available for rent in Dubai with free delivery.
features: Polypropylene casing with aluminium impeller — immune to rust and chemical corrosion
450 mm spigot both sides for inline duct mounting in ventilation risers and plant rooms
IPX4 motor enclosure withstands washdown and humid extraction environments
4,000 m³/hr moves air through 20 m of ductwork without booster fans
12 kg — lightest 450mm axial in its class for ceiling and riser installation
Single-phase motor with integrated terminal box and pre-wired capacitor
